revision_context: post-exploration methodological study; not a prospectively prespecified external validation
primary_endpoint: creatinine-defined AKI through discharge or postoperative day 7

estimands.source_development: 1/99 truncated-weight approximation to AKI risk among all baseline-eligible INSPIRE patients under MAR conditional on measured pre-prediction variables
estimands.local_update: 1/99 truncated-weight approximation to logistic recalibration parameters among all baseline-eligible MOVER 2021 patients under MAR conditional on measured pre-prediction variables
estimands.target_evaluation: hybrid AIPW/IPW performance among all baseline-eligible MOVER 2022 patients under MAR conditional on measured pre-prediction variables
estimands.complete_case_comparator: performance conditional on routine postoperative creatinine observation
estimands.mnar_sensitivity: stage-specific pattern-mixture outcome-regression completion sensitivity propagated through the source-update-target chain

observation_models.aipw_correction: untruncated cross-fitted 1/g correction; calibration slope and discrimination use the selected truncated IPW rule

canonical_analysis.model: expanded-IPW source development plus expanded-IPW MOVER 2021 logistic recalibration
canonical_analysis.source_preprocessor_training_population: all eligible INSPIRE patients within each point or bootstrap sample
canonical_analysis.source_classifier_training_population: outcome-observed INSPIRE patients with normalized 1/99 truncated inverse-observation weights
canonical_analysis.valid_replicate: all models converge and every prespecified canonical and stage-specific MNAR metric is finite

data_access.note: Raw and patient-level derived data are excluded. Obtain INSPIRE, MOVER, and VitalDB under their originating repository terms.
data_access.inputs: Configure local paths from environment variables or a private runtime configuration; do not commit local absolute paths.
